sourceRefs: DRAFT — c1.2 theme unit. Covers the equality-debate lexicon (méritocratie, égalité des chances, plafond de verre, entre-soi, discrimination positive, CV anonyme, quotas, mixité sociale) and the three-layer political-speech analysis (promise verbs vs escape hatches, euphemisms, eloquent absences). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 5 'Élites' ('Le CV anonyme et la discrimination positive', 'Le plafond de verre', 'La noblesse sous Louis XIV', analyser un discours politique contemporain). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
